nodes.label: AI for summarization and research
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of low-quality output requiring rework
nodes.grounding_span: I utilize AI in my daily work by leaning on it to help me with summary tasks

nodes.label: Human control over high-detail tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I generally prefer to do that myself. It could be a control issue

nodes.label: AI as adjustable starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI as complete replacement for human work
nodes.grounding_span: I generally use it to start the process and then take over from there

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.label_negative: Voluntary AI adoption with structured support
nodes.grounding_span: forced adoption, without direction is what is frustrating

nodes.label: AI reliance leading to laziness and oversight
nodes.grounding_span: others that are relying more heavily on AI could be 'phoning it in' a bit - and that, overall, could result in quality degradation

nodes.label: Quality and accuracy of work output
nodes.grounding_span: ensuring that we have robust test cases and acceptance criteria helps us ensure that we are installing code without defects

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I've even used it to assist in generating flowcharts, etc., where appropriate

nodes.label: Professional accountability
nodes.grounding_span: ultimately - I will be the one answering to the quality of products we deliver, not the AI tool I used

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI summaries
nodes.grounding_span: I utilize AI in my daily work by leaning on it to help me with summary tasks

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: forced adoption, without direction is what is frustrating

nodes.label: Frustration with AI performance degradation
nodes.grounding_span: others that are relying more heavily on AI could be 'phoning it in' a bit - and that, overall, could result in quality degradation

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: Hopefully, the AI tools just get better and better - and I feel that I can rely on them more heavily - but, I don't foresee me removing the human aspect any time soon

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I will, often, utilize AI to start this process - but, will generally take a much more tactile approach in refining results
